bug: The scuba buoyancy pack could not climb strongly enough.
root_cause: Buoyancy trim only changed VectorForce, while LinearVelocity continued to target a damped vertical velocity. The velocity controller was fighting the climb.

changes: Buoyancy trim now directly drives target vertical swim velocity.
Vertical damping is reduced as trim moves away from neutral.
VectorForce trim scale was reduced from 0.18 to 0.12 so the effect is controlled by velocity plus softer lift instead of fighting the controller.

device_review_needed: Hold inflate until the gauge fills above neutral; player should now climb clearly.
Release inflate; player should continue drifting up briefly and slowly return toward neutral.
Hold vent; player should sink clearly.
